brand.name: Ladybird Ever After
brand.fx_note: All USD prices use EUR->USD rate of 1.26 (5% safety factor applied to today's rate of ~1.154)
brand.positioning: US-based concierge wedding planning service for couples marrying in Ireland. One US-based contract in USD, one point of contact, full vendor management.
brand.package_philosophy: Guest counts are routing guidance used on intro calls — not hard contractual limits. Vendor cost variations at margins are absorbed within package margin and never passed on as line items.

elopement.description: Intimate ceremonies with a small number of guests. Adventure-focused, flexible locations across Ireland. Designed for couples who want a deeply personal experience without the formality of a traditional wedding.

wedding.description: Walk-down-the-aisle weddings with a full ceremony feel. Structured planning with a dedicated wedding planner, reception planning, and support for guest logistics.

guest_guidance.note: Guidance only — not a contractual limit

sales_performance.strategic_role: Entry-point elopement — captures intimate couples and feeds pipeline

failte.target_audience: Two-person elopements and very small intimate ceremonies. Couples who want to elope in Ireland with minimal guests — often just the two of them or with 1–2 witnesses. Budget-conscious relative to other packages but still full-service.

included.note: Base photography tier for this package. Upgrade options available.
LEA-delivered service. All venue communications and contracts handled on couple's behalf.
Full support navigating Irish marriage paperwork and timelines
One invoice, one point of contact, no international transfers

included.item: Unlimited planning calls with dedicated elopement planner

included.note: Full trip guidance, not just the wedding location
LEA-delivered. Securing the right restaurant for the couple post-ceremony.

failte.sales_routing: Lead with Fáilte for 2–4 guest enquiries. If couple's vision feels larger or they mention wanting more on the day, explore Grá.

guest_guidance.note: Guidance only — not a contractual limit. Photography vendor uses elopement rate up to 12 guests.

sales_performance.strategic_role: Solid mid-tier elopement — most popular with close family groups. Monitor close rate before any price adjustment.

gra.target_audience: Small group elopements — couples bringing close family or a small circle of friends. The ceremony still feels intimate and adventure-led but with more people to share it. Common profile: couple + parents + 1–2 siblings or best friends.

included.note: Mid-tier elopement photography. Upgrade or downgrade available.

included.item: Unlimited planning calls with dedicated elopement planner

gra.sales_routing: Lead with Grá for 5–12 guest enquiries. For couples at 10–12 guests, explore whether Sláinte better fits their vision — especially if they want reception planning or a more formal ceremony feel.

guest_guidance.note: Guidance only. Photography vendor switches to wedding rate above 12 guests — this cost difference is absorbed within the package margin and invisible to the couple.

sales_performance.strategic_role: Best converter in the portfolio. Highest expected profit per proposal — more than double any other package. Routing 13–25 guest enquiries here is the single highest-return action available.
sales_performance.performance_flag: PRIORITY — do not route 13–25 guest couples to Ard by default

slainte.target_audience: Couples who want a real wedding ceremony with guests — walking down the aisle, a dedicated wedding planner, and a structured day — but in an intimate Irish setting rather than a large venue. Typical profile: couple + 13–25 guests, often destination wedding from the US. Wants the full wedding feel without the scale of a traditional large wedding.

included.note: Wedding-rate photography (vs elopement rate in Fáilte/Grá). Upgrade and downgrade available.

included.item: Unlimited planning calls with dedicated wedding planner
included.note: Wedding planner (not elopement planner) from Sláinte upward
LEA-delivered. Securing pre-wedding dinner for the group.
LEA-delivered. Previously listed as reception coordination — renamed to reception planning. No external vendor cost.

slainte.sales_routing: Default package for all 13–25 guest enquiries. Do not route to Ard unless couple explicitly needs on-the-day coordinator and guest hotline as standard inclusions. For 20–25 guest couples, default to Sláinte — the close rate difference is significant.

guest_guidance.note: Guidance only — not a contractual limit

sales_performance.strategic_role: Highest profit per win in the portfolio. Close rate is the constraint — not the price. Focus on routing accuracy and photography upgrade conversations.
sales_performance.performance_flag: Close rate recovery from 30% to historical 37% would raise expected profit per proposal to ~$1,876

ard.target_audience: Couples hosting a full destination wedding in Ireland with a larger guest group. Wants the complete experience: dedicated wedding planner, on-the-day coordinator, guest hotline, reception planning, and comprehensive photography coverage. Often more logistically complex — hotel blocks, larger welcome dinners, multi-day events.

included.note: Base photography. Upgrade to half-day or full-day strongly recommended for groups this size.
Included as standard in Ard. Add-on in Sláinte and below.

included.item: Unlimited planning calls with dedicated wedding planner

included.note: Included as standard in Ard. Add-on in Sláinte and below.
LEA-delivered. Included as standard in Ard.

ard.sales_routing: Lead with Ard for 26–50 guest enquiries. Photography upgrade conversation (half-day or full-day) is strongly recommended for groups this size and is the primary upsell opportunity.

ladybird_bespoke.description: Pure planning fee for couples whose needs genuinely fall outside the four packages. LEA provides full planning expertise, local knowledge, vendor network access, and coordination. Couple pays all vendors directly.
ladybird_bespoke.positioning: Premium custom engagement — not a fallback or budget alternative to Ard. Surface on intro calls only when couple's vision or group size clearly does not map to a standard package.
ladybird_bespoke.visibility: Off pricing page — discussed on calls only

ladybird_lite.description: Self-service knowledge product. No ongoing manual LEA work after initial creation.
ladybird_lite.target_audience: Budget-conscious couples planning an Irish elopement independently, and vow renewal couples who need guidance but not full concierge service.
includes: Curated regional destination guide for Ireland
Vetted vendor directory with LEA's real contacts, price ranges, and approach notes
Budget tracker with expected cost ranges
ladybird_lite.strategic_value: Creates entry point into Ladybird brand at $400 with zero marginal cost per sale. Captures vow renewal market with no overlap with core package buyers. Warm lead pipeline into Fáilte and Grá.

vendor_costs.note: EUR costs converted at EUR->USD 1.26 (5% safety factor). Services at $0 USD are LEA-delivered with near-zero incremental cost.

photography_threshold_note: Photography vendors charge a different rate for groups above 12 guests — approximately €1,350 elopement rate vs €1,500 wedding rate (~$203 USD difference at safety-factor FX). Grá covers up to 12 guests and uses the elopement rate. Sláinte starts at 13 guests and uses the wedding rate. The $203 difference is absorbed within Sláinte's margin. Couples see a clean all-in price — no surcharge conversation.
margin_policy: All four packages must maintain gross margin at or above 50%. Adjusting package inclusions to protect margin is a last resort — pricing should be adjusted first if close rates or costs shift materially.

key_strategic_insights.detail: 20 guests is the single most common guest count in the dataset (22 deals). Previously routed to Ard at close rate of 27%. Correctly routed to Sláinte at 75% close rate. Annual uplift from this correction alone: +$43,000 gross profit.

key_strategic_insights.insight: Sláinte dominates on expected profit per proposal
key_strategic_insights.detail: At $3,686 expected profit per proposal, Sláinte generates more than double any other package. Volume of 13–25 guest enquiries routed correctly is the single highest-leverage sales action.

key_strategic_insights.insight: Ard close rate is the constraint, not the price
key_strategic_insights.detail: Ard at 30% close rate generates $1,521 expected profit per proposal. If close rate recovers to historical 37%, expected profit per proposal rises to ~$1,876. Focus on routing accuracy, not price reduction.

key_strategic_insights.insight: Grá is steady — monitor before adjusting
key_strategic_insights.detail: 40% close rate and $1,407 per proposal. Performing steadily. No price adjustment warranted at this time.

key_strategic_insights.insight: Fáilte is a funnel entry, not a revenue driver
key_strategic_insights.detail: At $894 per proposal, Fáilte earns its place by capturing couples and moving them into the pipeline. Not a revenue focus.
